title: Literature-style prose
description: Classic literary paragraph — rhythm, imagery, depth
text: It was a clear, cold afternoon in late October, the kind of day on which the trees seem to glow from inside. She walked along the river path, her hands tucked into her coat pockets, and listened to the leaves crunching softly under her boots. The world, for once, felt entirely her own.

tips.text: Literary prose has a slower mental tempo but rewards fast fingers
Imagery and adjectives test sustained accuracy under speed

character_tips.anna: Literary prose at 94 WPM. Few professional writers type their own work this fast.
